canonicalQuantity: geocentric apparent ecliptic longitude of date, degrees [0,360)

frame.plane: ecliptic of date (true equinox of date)

timeScale.inputCivil: local wall time in IANA timezone
timeScale.canonicalInstant: UTC (resolved once by the production tz->UTC owner)
timeScale.ephemerisScale: provider-internal TT via each provider's Delta-T; UT1~=UTC approximation accepted at product tolerance
timeScale.calendar: Gregorian (SE_GREG_CAL); pre-1582 out of corpus scope

ayanamsaProductionSource: swe_get_ayanamsa_ut under SE_SIDM_LAHIRI (identical to the value the SEFLG_SIDEREAL production path subtracts)
note: This lab compares independent references against the UNCHANGED production engine. It never mutates production output and never averages providers.
